phase_statuses.title: Extract chat compatibility support from the session service
phase_statuses.objective: Move update/delete compatibility helpers and repeated cache-reset behavior into a bounded support module while keeping `RagflowChatSessionService` as the stable facade.

acceptance_criteria.text: `RagflowChatSessionService` no longer directly owns the response coercion, update verification, dataset-ownership retry, delete compatibility sequencing, and repeated cache-reset details in one file.

`update_chat`, `clear_chat_parsed_files`, `delete_chat`, and `delete_agent` preserve the current public behavior, including stable error codes such as `chat_dataset_not_ready`, `chat_dataset_locked`, `chat_not_found`, and `agent_not_found`.
compatibility handling still fails fast on non-compatible upstream failures instead of adding silent downgrade paths.

phase_statuses.notes: - Extracted chat compatibility support into session_support.py and preserved update/delete semantics under focused pytest coverage.

phase_statuses.title: Focused regression validation and task evidence
phase_statuses.objective: Prove the bounded backend refactor preserved the current compatibility behavior and fail-fast semantics.

acceptance_criteria.text: focused backend compatibility tests pass against the final code state.
task artifacts record the exact commands run, verified acceptance coverage, and any bounded residual risk.

phase_statuses.notes: - Focused compile and pytest evidence recorded; acceptance coverage and residual risk captured in task artifacts.

goal: 继续进行前后端重构直到重构结束：优先重构 ragflow_chat/session_service.py 的 chat update/delete 兼容逻辑，并在时间允许时进一步拆分下载页 controller，保持现有 API、页面行为与测试契约稳定
